requirement_topic.en: Smart Charging Back Office, OCPP, and Payment Integration
requirement_topic.zh: 智能充电后台、OCPP 及支付集成
requirement_topic.zht: 智能充電後台、OCPP 及支付整合

summary.en: Myanmar does not have a confirmed AFIR-style public charging rule mandating ad-hoc payment, OCPP, or ISO 15118. Smart charging requirements are usually set by the project owner, charge-point operator, payment provider, mobile network provider, or utility. OCPP support, local payment integration, offline operation, and remote monitoring should be specified contractually.
summary.zh: 缅甸未确认存在类似 AFIR 的公共充电规则强制要求即时支付、OCPP 或 ISO 15118。智能充电要求通常由项目业主、充电运营商、支付服务商、移动网络服务商或电力单位确定。OCPP 支持、本地支付集成、离线运行和远程监控应通过合同明确。
summary.zht: 緬甸未確認存在類似 AFIR 的公共充電規則強制要求即時支付、OCPP 或 ISO 15118。智能充電要求通常由項目業主、充電運營商、支付服務商、移動網絡服務商或電力單位確定。OCPP 支援、本地支付整合、離線運行和遠端監控應透過合同明確。

standards_or_laws: Project owner or charge-point operator requirements
ISO 15118 where specified by vehicle or project requirement

summary.en: China smart chargers commonly support GB/T 27930 for DC vehicle communication, domestic operator platforms, QR payment flows, and GB/T 34658 interoperability evidence, alongside GB/T 18487 and GB/T 20234 baseline documents.
summary.zh: 中国智能充电桩通常支持 GB/T 27930 直流车辆通信、国内运营商平台、二维码支付流程和 GB/T 34658 互操作证据，并配套 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 基线文件。
summary.zht: 中國智能充電樁通常支援 GB/T 27930 直流車輛通訊、國內運營商平台、二維碼支付流程和 GB/T 34658 互操作證據，並配套 GB/T 18487 和 GB/T 20234 基線文件。

gap.en: A China cloud or payment stack may not work in Myanmar because of SIM, payment, language, data hosting, and support constraints. The exporter should confirm OCPP version, local SIM or Ethernet support, Myanmar payment gateway integration, offline charging behavior, and maintenance access.
gap.zh: 中国云平台或支付栈可能因 SIM、支付、语言、数据托管和支持限制而无法在缅甸运行。出口商应确认 OCPP 版本、本地 SIM 或以太网支持、缅甸支付网关集成、离线充电行为和维护访问方式。
gap.zht: 中國雲平台或支付棧可能因 SIM、支付、語言、數據託管和支援限制而無法在緬甸運行。出口商應確認 OCPP 版本、本地 SIM 或以太網支援、緬甸支付網關整合、離線充電行為和維護訪問方式。

mandatory_status.target: Not confirmed as national mandate; mandatory where specified by operator, payment provider, tender, or utility project
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic protocols and platform requirements apply only to China deployments

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Smart charging should be specified as a Myanmar project integration item. Do not assume a China operator cloud or payment flow is usable without local testing.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 智能充电应作为缅甸项目集成事项明确。不得假定中国运营商云平台或支付流程无需本地测试即可使用。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 智能充電應作為緬甸項目整合事項明確。不得假定中國運營商雲平台或支付流程無需本地測試即可使用。

requirement_topic.zh: 数据、网络安全及远程运营
requirement_topic.zht: 數據、網絡安全及遠端運營

summary.en: Connected EV chargers in Myanmar should define data flows, remote access, firmware update control, user account handling, payment data handling, and incident response. Requirements may come from the site owner, telecom provider, payment provider, or public-sector procurement terms rather than a single EVSE-specific cybersecurity rule.
summary.zh: 缅甸联网电动汽车充电桩应明确数据流、远程访问、固件更新控制、用户账户处理、支付数据处理和事件响应。要求可能来自场地方、电信服务商、支付服务商或公共部门采购条款，而非单一充电设备网络安全规则。
summary.zht: 緬甸聯網電動汽車充電樁應明確數據流、遠端訪問、韌體更新控制、用戶賬戶處理、支付數據處理和事件響應。要求可能來自場地方、電信服務商、支付服務商或公共部門採購條款，而非單一充電設備網絡安全規則。

standards_or_laws: Telecom provider requirements where connected services are used
Payment provider requirements where payment data is processed

summary.en: China products may include domestic cybersecurity, platform, app, QR payment, and firmware update controls tied to China cloud services and GB/T 27930 or operator protocols.
summary.zh: 中国产品可能包含与中国云服务和 GB/T 27930 或运营商协议绑定的国内网络安全、平台、App、二维码支付和固件更新控制。
summary.zht: 中國產品可能包含與中國雲服務和 GB/T 27930 或運營商協議綁定的國內網絡安全、平台、App、二維碼支付和韌體更新控制。

gap.en: Myanmar deployment may require a different cloud region, local administrator access, English or Burmese interfaces, payment data controls, and local service arrangements. The exporter should avoid hard dependencies on China-only servers, China-only SIMs, or China-only payment accounts.
gap.zh: 缅甸部署可能需要不同云区域、本地管理员访问、英文或缅文界面、支付数据控制和本地服务安排。出口商应避免强依赖仅限中国的服务器、SIM 或支付账户。
gap.zht: 緬甸部署可能需要不同雲區域、本地管理員訪問、英文或緬文界面、支付數據控制和本地服務安排。出口商應避免強依賴僅限中國的伺服器、SIM 或支付賬戶。

mandatory_status.target: Project or contract requirement unless a separate telecom, payment, or public procurement rule applies
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic platform controls do not automatically satisfy Myanmar operation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Review connected charger data and remote-operation design before Myanmar rollout. Local SIM, cloud, payment, and support dependencies are often the practical blocker.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在缅甸部署前应审查联网充电桩的数据和远程运营设计。本地 SIM、云、支付和支持依赖通常是实际阻断项。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在緬甸部署前應審查聯網充電樁的數據和遠端運營設計。本地 SIM、雲、支付和支援依賴通常是實際阻斷項。
